relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: Spirit warns that some teachings can pull people away from trust.
False severity rejects marriage and foods created for thanksgiving.
What the Divine creates is good when received with gratitude.
A good servant nourishes the siblings in trust and healthy teaching.
Empty myths are refused; reverence is trained.
Bodily training has value, but reverence reaches into all life.
The saying is trustworthy and welcome.
Labor rests on hope in the living Divine, Savior of all.
These things are taught and commanded.
Youth is not despised when life becomes a pattern of love, trust, and purity.
Public reading, encouragement, and teaching receive attention.
The gift in Timothy is not neglected.
Attending to self and teaching brings saving/healing to speaker and hearers.

contemplative_note: 1 Timothy 4 protects creation and practice: the body is not rejected, created things are received with thanks, and the gift matures through faithful attention.
